hero_title_accent: Compliance Operations for Hong Kong VASPs
hero_subtitle: SFTY links wallet risk signals with regulatory rules and case workflows to help Hong Kong VASPs maintain an auditable and efficient KYT compliance process.

problem_title: KYT monitoring stays disconnected from workflows
problem_description: Hong Kong VASPs face operational friction when KYT signals and wallet risk data remain isolated from jurisdiction-specific compliance checks. This creates gaps that slow case reviews, weaken audit trails and complicate regulatory alignment across fragmented systems.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates KYT risk signals, wallet data and provider outputs into a unified workflow that aligns with Hong Kong-specific compliance rules, strengthening case management and preserving audit evidence for VASP teams.
workflow_title: From wallet risk to compliance decisions
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates wallet risk signals, applies Hong Kong-specific rules, routes alerts into cases, records decisions and preserves evidence for audit and reporting.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for Hong Kong VASPs?
faq_1_answer: SFTY supports Hong Kong VASPs by connecting jurisdiction-specific KYT, Travel Rule, and regulatory rules into a connected compliance workflow with case management and audit-ready evidence.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle Hong Kong KYT workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates wallet risk and transaction monitoring from multiple KYT providers, applies Hong Kong-specific rules, and routes alerts into structured review and case workflows for compliance teams.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves detailed decision logs, case history, linked evidence, and regulatory rule changes to support audit readiness and defensible compliance record-keeping in Hong Kong contexts.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects outputs from current KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one operational layer without disrupting existing compliance stacks.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY acts as a provider-neutral layer that organizes and structures provider outputs but does not replace any underlying KYC, KYT or Travel Rule services.
final_title: Connect KYT monitoring to Hong Kong workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY supports wallet risk signals, regulatory rules and case workflows tailored for Hong Kong VASP compliance operations.
